nodes.name: Ptiloprora
nodes.summary: Ptiloprora（Ptiloprora）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Leaden honeyeater、Yellowish-streaked honeyeater、Rufous-sided honeyeater等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mayr's honeyeater
nodes.summary: Mayr's honeyeater（Ptiloprora mayri）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mayr's honeyeater。

nodes.name: Mayr's honeyeater
nodes.summary: Mayr's honeyeater (Ptiloprora mayri) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. There were no confirmed sightings between 2008 and 2023 until a scientific expedition to the Cyclops Mountains in New Guinea captured images of a pair of the birds in June and July of that year. References
nodes.shortSummary: Mayr's honeyeater (Ptiloprora mayri) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in New Guinea.
